rulings.Case Title: NIMER SHIHEIBER et al VS. JAMILEH BAJJALIEH et al
rulings.Rulings: Set for hearing on Friday, December 11, 2009, line 5, DEFENDANTS JAMILEH BAJJALIEH, ANTON BAJJALIEH DEMURRER TO SECOND AMENDED COMPLAINT. Demurrer overruled, ten days leave to answer. Factual issues exist whether defendant exercised due care when she took over the 911 call and refused to let paramedics in, whether she increased the risk of harm to decedent, or whether any harm was suffered due to decedent's reliance on defendant's undertaking. =(302/CWW)

rulings.Case Title: NIMER SHIHEIBER et al VS. JAMILEH BAJJALIEH et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Motion And Motion To Strike Portions Of Pltfs' Second Amended Complaint
rulings.Rulings: Set for hearing on Friday, December 11, 2009, line 5, DEFENDANTS JAMILEH BAJJALIEH, ANTON BAJJALIEH Motion To Strike Portions Of Plaintiff's Second Amended Complaint. Motion to strike granted without leave to amend as to punitive damages against defendant Jamileh Bajjalieh, whose name will be striken from the second amended complaint at page 10, line 7. No reasonable liklihood defect can be cured by amendment. =(302/CWW)

rulings.Case Title: SAMUEL H. HALLE II et al VS. VERNON R. LOUCKS JR et al
rulings.Rulings: Set for hearing on Friday, December 11, 2009, line 10, DEFENDANTS VERNON LOUCKS, CHARLES LOUCKS DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT. Demurrer overruled in part, and sustained in part. Demurrer overruled as to first, second, third, and sixth causes of action. Demurrer sustained with ten days leave to amend as to the fourth cause of action for alter ego liability and fifth cause of action for declaratory relief. Alter ego is a theory of liability, not an actual cause of action, and these claims should be pled in the general charging allegation. Declaratory relief cause of action is duplicative of alter ego claim and is not a separate cause of action. =(302/CWW)
